first_dialog: Okay good, it looks like the charm that I put on you finally got you to wake up - you really did take a hard fall.
No problem, I also cast a spell to contain the fire and prevent it from hurting you all - it doesn't extend past this room but it should stop us from all burning to a crisp.
The moment the earthquake hit I knew something was wrong so I cast a quick short range teleportation spell - I learned that this semester actually.
I'm not entirely sure but I think someone was experimenting with magic in this lab and had an accident which caused the earthquake and the floor to collapse and expose this lab.
I don't know who exactly owns this lab, but whatever they're doing it's reckless and could seriously hurt the people in this neighborhood, as you can already see.
I am also sensing the magical disturbance more strongly than ever, I think it's very possible that whatever it is, it's down here in the lab with us.
The disturbance might collapse very soon as well and possibly wipe out the entire neighborhood - we need to act now.
It's probably just past that door but my sister says that the store manager ran away and locked it which isn't good.
There's a digital lock and magical lock so I can give you a charm to break the magic lock but I'm bad with computers so my sister is going to need to help you out with that.

Anyway, here's the magical charm to break the magic lock. Unlock the door and stop whoever's behind this. I need to help heal Martin's broken arm so I'll stay behind. Hurry, we might not have much time before the disturbance collapses.
Also, don't worry, I called the fire department and they should be here soon - I'll make sure they get you when they arrive.
player_dialog: That's nice, so how did you even get here?
possible_dialog: Hurry, the magical collapse can happen any minute now!
